title: Global Passport Power Rankings & Visa Requirements
subtitle: Full visa matrix for 227 countries, updated weekly.
description: Singapore holds the world's most powerful passport in 2026 with visa-free access to 192 destinations. This dataset maps the complete visa requirement landscape between every country pair — 227 ranked countries, 45,000+ directional visa rules, sourced from the Henley Passport Index. Includes country reference data, current-year rankings, and the full origin-to-destination visa requirement matrix. Source: Henley Passport Index — https://www.henleyglobal.com/passport-index/

resources.description: List of countries with ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes and region; one row per country.
Current-year passport ranking per country; includes rank and visa-free destination count.
Origin→destination visa requirement matrix; one row per country pair with requirement_type (visa_free_access, visa_required, visa_on_arrival, visa_online, electronic_travel_authorisation).
